summary:
For a child who has swallowed 10cc of a 10% fluoride solution, the most effective initial step is administering milk to help bind and neutralize the fluoride quickly before it can cause significant harm.
Immediate administration of milk will aid in reducing the body’s exposure to fluoride through complexation, thereby minimizing potential adverse health impacts.
```
